summary: VitalFlow v3.0 Iteration 11 - P1 features tested. Fixed critical Dashboard bug (backgroundSync hoisting error). Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed after fix. Features verified: (1) /api/health/trend returns medical_alert field, (2) /api/wearables/sync returns 404 gracefully when no tokens, (3) Dashboard background sync timer implemented, (4) Medical alert popup component exists (data-testid='medical-alert-overlay'), (5) GestorDashboard sector filter works, (6) ZIP file generated at /app/vitalflow_v3.0.zip (144KB, 112 files).

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts sizing issue on initial render, does not affect functionality

backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user data after login
GET /api/health/trend returns 200 with trend, v_scores_7d, avg_7d, requires_intervention fields
GET /api/health/trend includes medical_alert field (can be None)
POST /api/wearables/sync returns 404 with 'Nenhum token salvo' when no tokens
GET /api/wearables returns 200 with list of devices
frontend: Login page loads correctly with email/password fields
Admin login with admin@vitalflow.com / Admin123!@# succeeds
Dashboard loads with gamification stats (data-testid='gamification-stats')
StatusOrb component displays V-Score (data-testid='status-orb')
History chart displays analyses (data-testid='history-chart')
Medical alert overlay component exists (data-testid='medical-alert-overlay') - not visible when V-Score is healthy
First access overlay component exists (data-testid='first-access-overlay') - not visible for admin user
GestorDashboard loads with 'Painel do Gestor' title
Sector filter dropdown (data-testid='setor-select') has 9 options
Sector filter works - selecting TI filters dashboard data
Clear filter button ('Limpar') appears when sector selected
Period filter 7d button present and works
Period filter 30d button present and works
Period filter 6m button present and works
Add Employee button present (data-testid='add-employee-btn')
Export PDF button present (data-testid='export-pdf-btn')
Team V-Score card present (data-testid='team-vscore')
Team stress card present (data-testid='team-stress')
V-Score trend chart present (data-testid='vscore-trend-chart')
Distribution chart present (data-testid='distribution-chart')

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Dashboard.js had 'Cannot access backgroundSync before initialization' error - useCallback was defined after the useEffect that used it. Moved backgroundSync definition before the useEffect.
Medical alert popup (data-testid='medical-alert-overlay') only shows when healthTrend.medical_alert.show is true (V-Score < 40 for 3+ days)
Background sync calls /api/wearables/sync every 30 minutes and on mount
ZIP file generated successfully at /app/vitalflow_v3.0.zip (144KB, 112 files)
context_for_next_testing_agent: VitalFlow v3.0 Iteration 11 - All P1 features verified. (1) Fixed critical Dashboard bug: backgroundSync useCallback was defined after the useEffect that used it, causing 'Cannot access backgroundSync before initialization' error. Fix: moved backgroundSync definition before the useEffect. (2) /api/health/trend now includes medical_alert field (None when V-Score is healthy, object with show/days/avg_score/message when V-Score < 40 for 3+ days). (3) /api/wearables/sync returns 404 with 'Nenhum token salvo' when no Google Fit tokens exist. (4) Dashboard background sync timer calls /api/wearables/sync every 30 minutes. (5) Medical alert popup (data-testid='medical-alert-overlay') only appears when medical_alert.show is true. (6) First access flow (data-testid='first-access-overlay') appears for RH-registered users with must_change_password or must_accept_lgpd flags. (7) ZIP file at /app/vitalflow_v3.0.zip (144KB, 112 files).

bug_fixed.issue: Dashboard runtime error: Cannot access 'backgroundSync' before initialization
bug_fixed.root_cause: JavaScript hoisting issue - useCallback function was defined after the useEffect that referenced it in its dependency array
bug_fixed.fix: Moved backgroundSync useCallback definition before the useEffect that uses it
bug_fixed.lines_changed: Moved lines 137-148 (backgroundSync definition) to before line 69 (useEffect that uses it)
